name: npc-portrait-assets
title: NPC形象素材
creator: lijin
notes: 2026-04-23 pause checkpoint. Chose Approach A and fixed the canonical runtime asset path at frontend/app/assets/npc-style-cast/portraits/. Landed 12 tavern-themed portraits covering merchant/guardian/healer/scholar/wanderer/spirit, added portraitCatalog.ts for archetype matching + deterministic variant selection, and rewired TavernNpcStage so owner-authored images still win (sprites.neutral > avatar > image_url > project fallback portrait) without cropping tavern-npc-style-cast.png anymore. Fresh validation for this checkpoint: npm --prefix .\frontend run typecheck, npm --prefix .\frontend run build. Frontend script tests were not rerun for this pause checkpoint because the task did not change service/rule scripts. Resume from phase 4 with browser visual QA + asset-size review before final closeout.
